title: coupon — settings
description: Tenant-facing preferences (per-tenant coupon defaults + rate-limit thresholds + retention window override). No user-level preferences — coupons are admin-authored artifacts, never a user preference surface.

groups.label: Coupons
groups.description: Tenant-wide defaults for coupon issuance + validation.

sections.label: Coupon defaults
sections.description: Default values applied to newly-created coupons. Overridable per coupon.

fields.name: default_per_customer_limit
fields.label: Default per-customer limit
fields.helpText: How many times a single customer can redeem the coupon. 1 = one-shot per customer.

fields.name: default_stackable
fields.label: Default: stackable
fields.helpText: Allow multiple coupons per invoice by default. Requires Enterprise `coupon_stackable`.

sections.label: Rate limits
sections.description: Preview + validate endpoint rate limits (protects against brute-force enumeration).

fields.name: rate_limit_ip_per_hour
fields.label: Max preview/validate calls per IP per hour
fields.helpText: 10 is a safe default. Raise for high-traffic tenants; lower for high-risk industries.

fields.name: rate_limit_user_per_hour
fields.label: Max preview/validate calls per authenticated user per hour

fields.name: weekly_report_recipients
fields.label: Weekly report recipients
fields.helpText: Users to notify when the weekly coupon usage report is generated. Empty = no notification (report still generated + available via GET /coupons/report).

fields.name: notify_on_every_redemption
fields.label: Notify admins on every redemption
fields.helpText: Opt-in real-time push. Useful for high-value / limited campaigns. Off by default (most tenants don't want per-redemption pings).
